typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter text-[#F5F2E9]
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F5F2E9]

grid_strategy.gallery: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) - Asymmetrical, gap-6 to gap-8, mixing tall/wide/square image spans
grid_strategy.menu: List based or 2-column bento with generous vertical spacing (gap-12)
grid_strategy.footer: Massive top padding, dark contrast background, huge typography for brand name

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with 1px border-b border-white/10
surfaces.cards: Minimalist borders: bg-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-[#CBA052]/50 transition-colors
surfaces.buttons: Primary: bg-[#CBA052] text-[#0F0F0F] hover:bg-[#DBC184]. Secondary: border border-[#CBA052] text-[#CBA052] hover:bg-[#CBA052]/10

hero.description: Dimly lit room with textured walls, perfectly matches the dark luxury ambiance.

about.description: Elegant dining tables set in a cozy restaurant interior.

menu_tapas.description: Inviting spread of various tapas dishes.

menu_mains.description: Exquisite tandoori chicken, representing modern Indian fine dining.

menu_drinks.description: Cozy restaurant interior with elegant wine glasses.

logos.placeholder: Text-based 'VS' logo in Gold (#CBA052) with 'Vine Social' in Cormorant Garamond if user logo asset is missing.

components.strategy: Hybrid: Custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing/front-facing layouts. Shadcn UI for forms, admin panel, modals.
components.shadcn_customization: Remove Vercel look. Set radii to rounded-none or rounded-sm. Borders to white/10. Backgrounds to deep charcoal.
components.icons: lucide-react for standard UI, optional @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone menu icons.

animations.interactions: Hover states must increase contrast. Button hovers subtle text-color/bg shifts.
animations.hero: Subtle scale-in/parallax on the hero background image. Max 50% opacity black overlay.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu tabs, reservation links) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Next.js (or React) multi-page style layout (or distinct sections) using Tailwind CSS.
Install and use Cormorant Garamond (headings) and Outfit (body).
Admin panel should be minimal, hidden behind simple auth, to manage gallery, menu, and announcements.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Strictly use the provided serif.
Use bento-style asymmetrical grids for the Gallery.
Never use full-width white backgrounds. Stick to the dark luxury palette.
Ensure all testing requirements (data-testid) are strictly met for form submissions, menu clicks, etc.
Use the provided actual image URLs from this json. NO PLACEHOLDERS.
